title: echinus claoxyloides
intro: Echinus claoxyloides, also known as the Sichuan prickly poppy or Chuan xin lian, is a plant species in the family Papaveraceae. It is a type of perennial plant native to China, valued for its medicinal properties and traditional uses in herbal medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Echinus claoxyloides is typically dried and processed into a powder or made into a decoction for oral consumption, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
